summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Phase 9.6 (Sabermetrics Layer: WAR/OPS/FIP) and Phase 11 (Ghost-edge detection with xERA/xwOBA in mlb_real_stats_verifier). All 661 tests passed (604 previous + 57 new). Zero regressions. Backend boot clean, imports verified, fail-soft scenarios validated, MLB-only isolation confirmed.
passed_tests: Backend boot: Clean startup with no errors

WAR impact: Elite/strong/replacement tier detection working

Orchestrator wiring: Sabermetrics context stored in pick_payload['sabermetrics'] + pick_payload['sabermetrics_audit']

Conservative layer: OPS alone doesn't force Over (validated via test_context_high_ops_low_runs_warning_does_not_force_over)
Conservative layer: Low OPS + strong FIP supports Under (validated via test_context_low_ops_strong_fip_supports_under)
